sections.title: Geographic Location and Area
paragraphs: Riyadh is located in the center of Saudi Arabia on the Najd plateau and is the political and administrative capital of the Kingdom.
The city covers more than 1,900 square kilometers and is experiencing rapid urban growth that reflects its central role in the national economy.
Riyadh enjoys a strategic location connecting it to all regions of the Kingdom, with modern infrastructure and leading economic and educational centers.

cta.title: Help Build Better Arab Cities
cta.description: Join a network of municipalities, researchers, and practitioners in a pioneering experience
